title: Device Home Screen - Disconnected device
scenario: Device Home Screen displays correct UI elements (Not Connected label, greyed out device image, battery icons, firmware version) when paired headset is disconnected
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
Ensure a headset is already paired with the app.
Turn off the paired headset or move it out of Bluetooth range so it disconnects.
Observe the Home screen of the app.

Verify the following elements are displayed on the Home screen:
  - Device Name (e.g., "Poly Voyager 5200") with an "i" icon next to it (if applicable).
  - A crossed red dot with the label "Not Connected".
  - A greyed out device image.
  - A "..." button (more options).
  - Greyed out Battery icons.
  - The firmware version displayed as "Version X.Y.Z" (e.g., "Version 6.15.0").
expected: The Home screen displays: Device Name with \"i\" icon, a crossed red dot with \"Not Connected\" label, a greyed out device image, a \"...\" button, greyed out Battery icons, and the firmware version \"Version X.Y.Z\".
